title: AI Observability — Overview
description: Global health across all providers, models, and environments.

list.name: env
list.label: Environment
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT env FROM ai_events ORDER BY env

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM ai_events WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT ROUND(AVG(latency_ms)::numeric,1) AS value FROM ai_events WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms)::numeric,1) AS value FROM ai_events WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT ROUND(SUM(cost_usd)::numeric,4) AS value FROM ai_events WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT ROUND((COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE error IS NOT NULL))::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),4) AS value FROM ai_events WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT ROUND(AVG(score)::numeric,3) AS value FROM ai_scores WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', created_at) AS time, provider, COUNT(*) AS requests FROM ai_events WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', created_at) AS time, 'p50' AS pct, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS latency FROM ai_events WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', created_at), 'p95', PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) FROM ai_events WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', created_at), 'p99', PERCENTILE_CONT(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) FROM ai_events WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', created_at) AS time, model, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd)::numeric,6) AS cost FROM ai_events WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', created_at) AS time, ROUND(AVG(score)::numeric,4) AS avg_score, COUNT(*) AS samples FROM ai_scores WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT provider, model, env, COUNT(*) AS requests, ROUND(AVG(latency_ms)::numeric,1) AS avg_ms, ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms)::numeric,1) AS p95_ms, ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms)::numeric,1) AS p99_ms, SUM(total_tokens) AS total_tokens, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd)::numeric,4) AS total_cost_usd, ROUND((COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE error IS NOT NULL))::numeric/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),4) AS error_rate FROM ai_events WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY provider,model,env ORDER BY requests DESC
